description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine zone_2, and is implemented by a call to zone_2. Use this API to tabulate zone totals by zone. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = zone(sid, all)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid zone subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. zone subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All zones or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

all.description: process only zones in zone subsystem SID.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
